title: Lattice kinetic Monte Carlo model to simulate RNA polymerase II clusters during stem cell differentiation
author: Klingberg, Tim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This data set includes Python scripts (numerical simulation and analysis) and already generated simulation data for RNA polymerase II clusters during stem cell differentiation. It includes the whole data to recreate panels. Updated Version 2026.
steps_raw: This data set includes Python scripts (numerical simulation and analysis) and already generated simulation data for RNA polymerase II clusters during stem cell differentiation. It includes the whole data to recreate panels. Updated Version 2026.
